issues.description: Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and -10000 power debuff to opponent character is not mentioned in official card text. This effect appears to be fabricated and has no basis in the card's stated effect.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text states 'during this turn' which indicates the boost applies only while it is your turn, not until end of turn.
